predecessor_for: WO-PIPELINE-SEMANTIC-HEADER-PARSER (Phase 2.5, not yet created); WO-PIPELINE-IMPORT-RESOLUTION (Phase 3, not yet created)
objective: Phase 2 of CODEREF-CORE pipeline refactor. Split relationship extraction into typed raw-fact records (import, call, export, header-import placeholder) without resolution. Hard-stop before Phase 2.5/3/4.

prep_artifacts.produced_by: Gemini Flash via Lloyd AgentSpawner PID 24176

handoff.reason: ORCHESTRATOR authored plan from Gemini Flash prep deliverables; CODEREF-CORE executes Phase 2 implementation. Same handoff pattern as Phase 0 + Phase 1.

execution_rules: Phase 2 hard-stops before Phase 2.5 / Phase 3 / Phase 4. Do not begin resolver work in this WO.
No raw fact may carry a field that names a graph node ID as endpoint. Enforced by no-graph-edge-claim.test.ts.
Method calls MUST preserve receiver text (obj.save() never reduces to bare 'save').
Scope path MUST be populated for every call.
Header-import facts are PLACEHOLDERS only. No BNF parsing, no validation, no @-tag extraction beyond detecting @imports presence.
Phase 0 ground-truth tests MUST CONTINUE TO FAIL for their original reasons. If any flips to PASS, halt and report — that is a regression in Phase 2's discipline.
Single bundled scope: all six modified files + five new test files + four fixture dirs land together. No partial commits.
hard_constraints: No graph-node-ID writes on raw facts.
No projection-field renames or removals — additive only.
acceptance_criteria: RawImportFact, RawCallFact, RawExportFact, RawHeaderImportFact types defined in src/pipeline/types.ts.
src/pipeline/extractors/relationship-extractor.ts emits four typed arrays via PipelineState.
Method-call receiver text preserved on every RawCallFact (proven by raw-call-facts.test.ts).
Scope path populated on every RawCallFact (proven by raw-call-facts.test.ts).
Alias bindings captured in RawImportFact.specifiers (proven by raw-import-facts.test.ts).
Dynamic + type-only flags captured (proven by raw-import-facts.test.ts).
Header-import placeholders emitted with rawString preserved (proven by raw-header-import-placeholders.test.ts).
no-graph-edge-claim.test.ts passes (no raw fact field names a graph node ID).
All Phase 1 tests still pass (element-taxonomy, single-scanner, semantic-canonical).
Phase 0 ground-truth tests STILL FAIL for original reasons (NOT pass).
populate-coderef end-to-end produces valid output with element/file counts in same order of magnitude as Phase 1 baseline.
All exit criteria documented in execution-notes.md (task 1.17).

decisions_log.rationale: Roadmap Phase 2 is one of nine sequential gated phases.

decisions_log.decision: Header-import facts are PLACEHOLDERS in Phase 2; actual @imports parsing in Phase 2.5.
decisions_log.rationale: Roadmap line 152 explicitly defers parsing to Phase 2.5. Phase 3 needs the placeholders to know what to resolve.

decisions_log.decision: Projection seam edit is ADDITIVE — rawFacts is optional on registry items, existing fields unchanged.
decisions_log.rationale: Phase 1 unified projections cleanly. ENTITY dashboard and other consumers must not break on absence of rawFacts in older data.

decisions_log.decision: Phase 0 ground-truth tests STILL FAIL is an acceptance criterion, not a defect.
decisions_log.rationale: Per roadmap, tests pass starting Phase 3/4. Gemini Flash prep adjudication confirmed against roadmap line 143-184. Original prep brief framing was wrong; Gemini caught it.

decisions_log.decision: Phase 2 prep used Gemini Flash via Lloyd AgentSpawner.
decisions_log.rationale: Independent eyes (different model than plan author Claude Opus). Flash sufficient for code-reading + structured-output prep; Pro was quota-blocked.

communication_log.message: Workorder created for Phase 2 (Relationship Extraction — Raw Facts). Plan authored from Gemini Flash prep deliverables (PID 24176). 18 tasks, hard-stop before Phase 2.5. Phase 0 ground-truth tests deliberately remain failing per roadmap.

Closed via DISPATCH-2026-05-02-008 (cross-project close from SKILLS, working dir CODEREF-CORE per DISPATCH-010). Cultural validator scope 11/11 PASS, tracking-validator scope+full 15/15 PASS each. Implementation chain ef7c5b7..2a2787a already on origin/main (12 commits). Phase 0 ground-truth tests still FAIL per Phase 2 discipline. Hand-off to Phase 2.5 awaits /plan-tests-for-workorder skill availability.
